description: A maxillofacial surgeon needs both a bone model and a soft-tissue (skin) model for reconstructive planning from the loaded CT Cranium DICOM scan. Export a 3D bone model (using the 'Bone' preset 226-3071 HU) to /home/ga/Documents/bone_model.stl and a 3D skin/soft-tissue model (using the 'Skin' or 'Soft Tissue' preset) to /home/ga/Documents/skin_model.stl. Both files must be valid binary STL files representing their respective anatomical structures.
